entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A cultivated food legume and source of high-quality protein, scientifically known as Cicer arietinum L.

entities.name: RNA-SEQ
entities.description: A high-resolution sequencing method used to analyze gene expression patterns.

entities.name: GENE EXPRESSION ATLAS
entities.description: A comprehensive map (CaGEA) of gene expression across plant developmental stages and organs.

entities.name: GROWTH AND DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The programmed expression of genes across time, stage, and tissue in plants.

entities.name: ICC 4958
entities.description: A widely used drought tolerant cultivar of chickpea.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant cultivar to maintain growth and productivity under water-limited conditions.

entities.name: DIFFERENTIALLY EXPRESSED GENES
entities.description: Genes that show statistically significant differences in expression levels across different tissue combinations.

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The biological process of flower development in plants.

entities.name: NODULATION
entities.description: The process of forming nodules on roots for nitrogen fixation.

entities.name: SEED DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological process of seed formation and growth.

entities.name: ROOT DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The biological process of root system growth and architecture.

entities.name: QTL-HOTSPOT
entities.description: A genomic region containing multiple quantitative trait loci associated with a specific trait.

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by a deficiency of water available to the plant.
